source_pr.title: ddl: remove index_test.go
source_pr.body:
The tests in `index_test.go` is the old implementation to test index change.
In the tests, we mock DML queries during DDL operation by calling Table functions directly
It's not the same behavior as normal query.

Since we already covered the DDL index change in `index_change_test.go` and this test is unstable.
We can safely remove it.

symptoms: Since we already covered the DDL index change in `index_change_test.go` and this test is unstable.

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR removes an older DDL index-change test file because it is described as unstable, but the available diff/case evidence does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature or a specific root-cause mechanism we can confidently tag. We therefore keep a conservative fallback classification.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: Since we already covered the DDL index change in `index_change_test.go` and this test is unstable.
